feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)

entry.title: fallingforyou
entry.summary:
Author: httpchanscurls

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,226Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: lowkey based on the song Fallingforyou by The 1975. Even after death, Jason can’t get rid of those persistent feelings for Dick and tries to run. Dick finds him anyway and neither of them is ready for what’s still there.

entry.title: Pinned Butterfly
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,409Chapters: 6/18Kudos: 337

Summary: Renegade was suave, dangerous, and inevitable. He was everything she feared but was inexorably drawn to. He was also the former Robin, Jason's predecessor, breaking off his path with Batman and the Teen Titans to pursue a life as a mercenary with Deathstroke as his mentor. For months, Jason had dallied and exchanged flirty quips with the villain on the field. But that had all been games. When Jason saw something she shouldn't have one night, she suddenly found herself Renegade's—Dick Grayson's—prisoner. aka. Like the story Renegade but with Jason having always been a girl.

entry.title: Pet Diary
entry.summary:
Author: CallmeSSS

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,211Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Gotham has a crime rate that rivals its population count, police sirens are familiar background noise, and people learn not to ask too many questions.Dick Grayson and Tim Drake don't ask too many questions either.About the gray rabbit who sulks over bread.About the black cat who looks at them like he's plotting something.About why things in the apartment sometimes move on their own.They just think they're keeping pets.They're not entirely wrong.

entry.title: You are precious to me.
entry.summary:
Author: Nyx_dreamy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 164,836Chapters: 61/?Kudos: 365

Summary: Damian had been sexually assaulted and after that his father saw the video, he just want to run away. That is how he end up living with Dick. Dick is conflicated about his feelings for Jason. Damian is now under his care and him and Bruce are still awkward around each other. And something is up with Tim but he doesn't know what. Jason is waiting for Dick to give him a proper answer. His hate for Bruce is too strong and he do not feel welcome in their perfect little family. or Everyone is dealing with things and their family is slowly falling appart. Would they succeed to all get along and get over the mistakes of the past?

entry.title: no light, no light
entry.summary:
Author: pigeonegg

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,521Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 264

Summary: Jason falls asleep trying not to desperately inhale the faint scent of Dick’s cologne, trying not to play the words honey and sweetheart over and over in his head, trying not to think of Dick, shirtless in the bathroom, rolling his eyes and walking out without saying a word.He tries an awful lot and fails anyway.This is where it starts: the slamming of a bedroom door. Jason is twelve, and Dick hates him.

entry.title: glasses
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,111Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 59

Summary: He takes a seat on the couch once he sorts out the recycling, Dick climbing into his lap when he notices. Jason takes one good look at Dick, gets one good glimpse of his face, and notices a pair of black square frames right smack dab in the center. They accentuated his features in a way that made Jason's brain short circuit because he'd never seen Dick in glasses. In a domino mask, sure, but that wasn't nearly the same. Jason hums, "Are they new?" "No, I just don't wear them all that much," Dick replies, "They're just for reading. Not actual like…corrective lenses." Dick makes a motion to take them off, but Jason shakes his head. "Those glasses look nice," Jason says, casually.or: prompt number one - I didn't know you wore glasses and I'm thinking normal thoughts about you right now, I swear.

entry.title: A Little Love
entry.summary:
Author: Inupi_big_brother_is_sesshomaru

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,334Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Dick is at a loss at what to do. His stay-at-home assassin has backed himself by the wall, body tense, and Jason’s yelling at him about said assassin, threatening to tell Bruce. Now, that’s totally unfair. How many secrets has Dick kept from Bruce for Jay? The one time Dick has a big secret and Jason’s first reactions to tell Bruce? So much for independence. Not that Jason is wrong. Had this been in reverse, Dick would've told Jason the same thing. He should’ve told Bruce about James (Until his murder-roommate told him his real name, Dick had decided he was James.) when he first found him. However, (and this is Dicks biggest excuse reason) James was found in Bludhaven. Which makes it Dick’s problem. Bruce has no right to butt his head into his business. Either way, Dick’s got it handled. James hadn’t killed anyone under his watch (as far as Dick knew) and he makes a great roommate. It’s not like he had anywhere else to put him.(And if loneliness had played a part in that decision… well. That was Dick’s business.)

entry.title: The Cowl Stays On
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,106Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 37

Summary: Jason goes down on his knees with nothing more than a firm hand to his shoulder. The cowl shows Dick the way his heart rate spikes from that alone. Around them, Gotham churns in the ever-swelling current of the night. Police sirens in the distance. Stray dogs barking. Rats scuffling through the putrid alley refuse. For the moment, though, they ignore the thrum of urban life. "Take it off, Jaybird," Dick says, voice low and course. The way his would sound. The nickname, of course, is all Dick. Old habits. Slowly, Jason reaches up and pulls off the red helmet, setting it on the ground at his knees. Red domino underneath. He knew it would be there, but is still disappointed. There are a myriad of reasons why it has to stay on, but Dick would love to see those pretty blue-green eyes blinking up at him from his knees._____DickJay Week 2026 day 6 Batman Dick/Knightfight | Fake/Accidental Marriage | Public Sex | "So I'm your dirty little secret?"

entry.title: Gimme All You Got (I Can Take It)
entry.summary:
Author: Starless_Void

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,593Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 113

Summary: Jason returns to Gotham a year after his showdown with Bruce and the Joker. He hopes to lie under the radar for a bit while he builds up a cleaner reputation for the Red Hood in the Narrows. Dick lost Jason once to the Joker, then a second time to Bruce's morals. When he gets word that Jason has returned to Gotham while Batman and Robin are on a deep space mission, Dick seizes the opportunity to reconnect with his protege, hoping to fix their bond and in the process, fix himself. Losing Bludhaven was a hard blow, and learning that Jason had been so close only to be lost to them again broke something in Dick that he hasn't been able to fix. Can Jason handle finally having someone who will always choose him first, or will he suffocate under Dick's possessive tendencies and need for constant control? Can Dick break through Jason's walls and bring his little wing back into the fold, or will he push too hard and force Jason away for good?
